# virtuacloud_cloud_server_password (Data Source)

Retrieve the root or rescue password for a Virtua.Cloud server. The password is sensitive and will not be displayed in logs.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `password_type` (String) Type of password to retrieve: root or rescue.
- `server_uuid` (String) UUID of the cloud server.

### Read-Only

- `password` (String, Sensitive) The server password. This value is sensitive.
